## Problem

What need does this address? Why is it needed now?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change. If multiple approaches exist, list them with trade-offs.

## Roadmap Alignment

Which version/phase does this belong to? See [docs/project-specification.md](../../docs/project-specification.md).
